case_title: FIRST FEDERAL BANK OF CALIFORNIA VS. JOHN DAVIS et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT DAVIS, JOHN AKA JOHN DAVID

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-07-2009 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT JOHN DAVIS' WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTS THE APPLICATION AS TO JURY EXPENSES AND FEES AND COURT REPORTERS' FEES. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E.
